name: Centella Asiatica
description: Centella asiatica (also known as cica or tiger grass) is a medicinal herb prized for its powerful calming and healing properties. Its active compounds -- madecassoside, asiaticoside, and asiatic acid -- reduce inflammation, promote collagen synthesis, and accelerate wound healing, making it ideal for sensitive, irritated, or post-procedure skin.
